scripts.deploy:eth: yarn build && goldsky subgraph deploy music-eth/1.0.0 --path build
scripts.deploy:poly: yarn build:poly && goldsky subgraph deploy music-poly/1.0.0 --path build
scripts.replace:eth: goldsky subgraph delete music-eth/1.0.0 && yarn deploy:eth
scripts.replace:poly: goldsky subgraph delete music-poly/1.0.0 && yarn deploy:poly
